summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Google Reviews integration. All 34 backend API tests passed successfully. Verified 4-account authentication system, admin-only config access, manual review creation, rating computation, public feed filtering, and review moderation.
passed_tests: Admin login (admin@bibi.cars) via /api/auth/login returns access_token
Manager login (manager@bibi.cars) via /api/auth/login returns access_token
Team Lead login (teamlead@bibi.cars) via /api/auth/login returns access_token
Customer login (user@bibi.cars) via /api/customer-auth/login returns accessToken
Customer login (test@customer.com) via /api/customer-auth/login returns accessToken
GET /api/admin/google-reviews/config without auth returns 401
GET /api/admin/google-reviews/config with manager token returns 403
GET /api/admin/google-reviews/config with team_lead token returns 403
GET /api/admin/google-reviews/config with admin token returns 200 with all required fields
Config has correct default values (min_rating_filter=4, fallback_rating=4.9, fallback_count=31)
PUT /api/admin/google-reviews/config with empty api_key doesn't overwrite existing key
PUT /api/admin/google-reviews/config with new api_key updates it and sets has_api_key=true
api_key_preview is properly masked (test...2345)
POST /api/admin/google-reviews/sync without config returns 400 with correct error message
Error message mentions 'Google Places API key and Place ID must be set'
POST /api/admin/google-reviews/manual creates 5-star review with source='manual'
POST /api/admin/google-reviews/manual creates 3-star review successfully
GET /api/public/google-reviews returns 200 without authentication
Public feed has all required fields (enabled, rating, count, url, reviews, min_rating_filter)
Public feed correctly filters reviews by min_rating_filter (only shows 4+ star reviews)
3-star review is hidden from public feed due to min_rating_filter=4
Aggregate rating is computed from ALL non-hidden reviews (4.1 average from 7 reviews)
Aggregate count includes all non-hidden reviews
PATCH /api/admin/google-reviews/{id} with hidden=true successfully hides review
Hidden review is removed from public feed
PATCH /api/admin/google-reviews/{id} with pinned=true successfully pins review
DELETE /api/admin/google-reviews/{id} returns 200 with success=true
Deleted review is removed from admin list
